data.title: Telos beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates Q3 outlook
data.description:
• Telos press release (NASDAQ:TLS): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of -$0.09 beats by $0.05.
  • Revenue of $28.5M (-13.4% Y/Y) beats by $1.98M.
  • Financial Outlook
      3Q 2024
    Revenue $22 - $24 Million vs. consensus of $29.41 million
    YoY Growth (39%) - (34%)
    Adjusted EBITDA1 ($8.0) - ($6.5) Million

data.title: Savers Value Village Non-GAAP EPS of $0.14
data.description:
• Savers Value Village press release (NYSE:SVV): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.14.
  • Net sales increased 2% to $386.7 million, with the United States up 5.4% and Canada down 2.4%.
  • Net income and adjusted net income were $9.7 million and $23.7 million, respectively.
  • Total active members enrolled in our U.S. and Canadian loyalty programs increased 11.8% to 5.7 million.

data.title: Dividend Roundup: Prudential Financial, Progressive, Alcoa, Eli Lilly, and more
data.description:
This week's dividend activity included increased payouts from J&J Snacks (JJSF) and C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) as well as declarations from companies like Progressive (NYSE:PGR) and Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU).

Additionally, looking towards next week, industry players such as Alcoa (NYSE:AA) and Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) will see the ex-dividend dates for their upcoming dividend payments.

See a breakdown below of some of the highlights of this week, along with some upcoming activity on the dividend front.

Dividend Increases

Here are some companies that have announced a dividend increase in the past week:

EnerSys (ENS)

  • Dividend declared: August 7
  • New dividend amount: $0.24
  • Previous amount: $0.225
  • Increase: 6.7%

J&J Snacks (JJSF)

  • Dividend declared: August 7
  • New dividend amount: $0.78
  • Previous amount: $0.735
  • Increase: 6.1%

C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW)

  • Dividend declared: August 8
  • New dividend amount: $0.62
  • Previous amount: $0.61
  • Increase: 1.6%

Dividend Declarations

Here are some companies that have announced a dividend in the past week:

Progressive (PGR)

  • Dividend declared: August 5
  • Dividend amount: $0.10

Prudential Financial (PRU)

  • Dividend declared: August 6
  • Dividend amount: $1.30

Shutterstock (SSTK)

  • Dividend declared: August 6
  • Dividend amount: $0.30

Hilton Worldwide (HLT)

  • Dividend declared: August 7
  • Dividend amount: $0.15

Upcoming Dividend Calendar

Here are some companies that have an ex-dividend date coming next week:

Alcoa (AA)

  • Ex-dividend date: August 12
  • Payout date: August 29

ConocoPhillips (COP)

  • Ex-dividend date: August 12
  • Payout date: September 3

Eli Lilly (LLY)

  • Ex-dividend date: August 15
  • Payout date: September 10

Diamondback Energy (FANG)

  • Ex-dividend date: August 15
  • Payout date: August 22

data.title: PepGen GAAP EPS of -$0.87
data.description:
• PepGen press release (NASDAQ:PEPG): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$0.87.
  • Cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were $161.3 million as of June 30, 2024, which is anticipated to fund currently planned operations into 2026.

data.title: TransUnion declares $0.105 dividend
data.description:
• TransUnion (NYSE:TRU) declared $0.105/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 0.49%
  • Payable Sept. 9; for shareholders of record Aug. 23; ex-div Aug. 23.
  • See TRU Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Disc Medicine GAAP EPS of -$1.03
data.description:
• Disc Medicine press release (NASDAQ:IRON): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$1.03.
  •  Cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities were $500.9 million as of June 30, 2024, which are expected to fund operational plans well into 2027.

data.title: Wajax reports Q2 results
data.description:
• Wajax press release (OTCPK:WJXFF): Q2 revenue of C$568.3 million and adjusted basic earnings per share of C$1.06, down from C$586.2 million and C$1.26, respectively.
  • Gross profit margin of 20.9%, up from 19.9% in 2023.
  • Second quarter adjusted EBITDA margin of 9.6%, compared to 9.8% in 2023.

data.title: Energy Transfer announces proposed sale of units by certain holders
data.description:
• Energy Transfer LP (NYSE:ET) on Friday announced an underwritten public offering of over 38.75M of its common units representing limited partner interests by WTG Midstream and an affiliate of Stonepeak.
  • The selling unitholders will receive all proceeds from the proposed offering. Energy Transfer (ET) will not sell any common units in the offering and will not receive any proceeds therefrom.
  • Barclays is serving as the underwriter for the offering.
  • Shares of Energy Transfer LP (ET) were down 2.28% premarket.

data.title: Uranium Energy appoints CFO
data.description:
• Uranium Energy (NYSE:UEC) said on Friday that Josephine Man has joined the uranium exploration and extraction company as treasurer and CFO, effective October 1.
  • Man succeeds Pat Obara, who will step down from the CFO position but continue as senior vice-president, administration.
  • Currently, Man serves as CFO of Uranium Royalty (UROY) (URC:CA).
  • Source: Press Release
